hooks.command: c=$(cat); echo "$c" | grep -qiE 'gh +pr +merge' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"PROJECT RULE (post-merge): a PR was just merged. Before this task is done you MUST (1) update ROADMAP.md to reflect what shipped, and (2) ensure e2e tests exist for the merged feature in apps/frontend/e2e and are passing. Do not report the task complete until both are done."}}'; exit 0

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"PROJECT RULE (post-merge): a PR was just merged. Before this task is done you MUST (1) update ROADMAP.md to reflect what shipped, and (2) ensure e2e tests exist for the merged feature in apps/frontend/e2e and are passing. Do not report the task complete until both are done."}}'
